children.heading: Indication of entity best suited to assist international market development for and export of United States dairy products
children.label: a Indication of entity best suited to assist international market development for and export of United States dairy products

children.text: the United States dairy industry has not established an export trading company under the Export Trading Company Act of 1982 ( et seq.) for the purpose of facilitating the international market development for an exportation of dairy products produced in the United States on or before ; or15 U.S.C. 4001June 30, 1997

the quantity of exports of United States dairy products during the 12-month period preceding does not exceed the quantity of exports of United States dairy products during the 12-month period preceding by 1.5 billion pounds (milk equivalent, total solids basis).July 1, 1998July 1, 1997

children.heading: Funding of export activities
children.label: b Funding of export activities
children.text: The Secretary shall assist the entity or entities identified under subsection (a) in identifying sources of funding for the activities specified in subsection (a) from within the dairy industry and elsewhere.

children.heading: Application of section
children.label: c Application of section
children.text: This section shall apply only during the period beginning on and ending on .July 1, 1997September 30, 2000
